notableEvents.label: Tommy Edman reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Tommy Edman reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Alika Williams.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas grounds into a double play, shortstop Alika Williams to second baseman Joshua Kuroda-Grauer to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Tommy Edman out at 2nd. Miguel Rojas out at 1st.
